zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Marguerite de Bommiers de Beaumetz et de Mirebeau於1285年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易英德波米爾斯時，她的父親Thibault II de Bommiers de Beaumetz du Broc31歲，母親Marguerite de Villebéon-Nemours25歲。她於1293年與Jean IV de Bouville結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: et
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: West Frisian and Dutch: from the Frisian personal name Ente, possibly from an ancient Germanic name composed with Old High German ando ‘breath, wrath’.
Dutch (Van der Ent): topographic name for someone living at the end of the village.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Marguerite de Bommiers de Beaumetz et de Mirebeau was born in 1285, in Bommiers, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Thibault II de Bommiers de Beaumetz du Broc, was 31 and her mother, Marguerite de Villebéon-Nemours, was 25. She married Jean IV de Bouville in 1293. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1368, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame Marguerite de Bommiers de Beaumetz et de Mirebeau est née en 1285, à Bommiers, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Thibault II de Bommiers de Beaumetz du Broc, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Villebéon-Nemours, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Jean IV de Bouville en 1293. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1368, à l’âge de 83 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Marguerite de Bommiers de Beaumetz et de Mirebeau(이)가 1285년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 봄미어스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thibault II de Bommiers de Beaumetz du Broc(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Villebéon-Nemours(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1293년 Jean IV de Bouville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Marguerite de Bommiers de Beaumetz et de Mirebeau родилась в 1285 г. в местности боммиирс, индр, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Thibault II de Bommiers de Beaumetz du Broc было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Villebéon-Nemours, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean IV de Bouville в 1293 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1368 г. в возрасте 83 лет.
